title: crataegus × media var. monoxyacantha
intro: Crataegus × media var. monoxyacantha, also known as the hybrid hawthorn, is a cross between the midland hawthorn (Crataegus laevigata) and the may hawthorn (Crataegus monogyna), resulting in a unique and potent medicinal plant. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various cardiovascular issues, including high blood pressure, coronary heart disease, and arrhythmia, due to its rich content of flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Crataegus × media var. monoxyacantha include improved cardiovascular function, enhanced vasodilation, and reduced inflammation, making it a valuable remedy for promoting overall cardiovascular well-being. Crataegus × media var. monoxyacantha can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
